forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KW260M8QZ8T37A8RZGDDVZ81
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: a980
+project: expect
+title: Surface catalog read ops (surface get / surfaces list)
+---
+## What
+Implement the read-only `surface` noun: a catalog describing each of the six adapters (cli/http/browser/gui/file/db) — how each drives, observes, and its in-process mechanism. Source content from `ideas/expect.md` §"Surface adapters" table. This is a static, no-agent, no-system read.
+
+- In `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect`: a `surfaces` module exposing `SurfaceInfo { name: Surface, drive: String, observe: String, mechanism: String, locator_dialect: String, deterministic: bool }` and a `catalog() -> Vec<SurfaceInfo>`.
+- Wire the `surface get <name>` and `surfaces list` ops in `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/expect/mod.rs` (replace the stubs) returning `json_result(...)`.
+- Adapters not yet implemented are still *described* here (catalog is documentation of intent); a later surface task flips `available`/`deterministic` truthfully if needed.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `expect surfaces list` returns all six surfaces with drive/observe/mechanism/locator fields populated from the design table.
+- [ ] `expect surface get cli` returns the cli entry; an unknown surface name errors clearly.
+- [ ] cli/http/file/db/browser/gui marked `deterministic: true` (per design — mechanical actuation); the catalog notes agent-fallback is the only non-determinism source.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Unit test: `catalog()` has exactly 6 entries with the expected names.
+- [ ] Tool test: `surface get cli` / `surfaces list` dispatch and return the expected JSON shape.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-tools surface` passes.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`.
\ No newline at end of file

   text: 'Picked up. Research done: Surface enum (closed 6-variant, lowercase serde) lives in swissarmyhammer-expect/src/types.rs. Source tables in ideas/expect.md §"Surface adapters" (drive/observe/mechanism) and §"Locators are a per-surface dialect" (locator_dialect). expect tool stubs in tools/.../expect/mod.rs dispatch generically to not_implemented. swissarmyhammer-tools does NOT yet depend on swissarmyhammer-expect (workspace entry exists) — will add. Plan: new surfaces module (SurfaceInfo + catalog() + get()), wire get surface/list surfaces in execute(). TDD.'
   timestamp: 2026-06-26T19:08:37.891029+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw2ny6b1bk1pawx5vnrgp9f7
+  text: |-
+    Implemented. Files changed:
+    - crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/surfaces.rs (new): SurfaceInfo + catalog() (6 adapters from ideas/expect.md, all deterministic=true, agent-fallback noted) + get(); tests incl. a golden test pinning every field to the design table.
+    - crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/lib.rs: pub mod surfaces + re-export SurfaceInfo.
+    - crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/expect/mod.rs: wired `get surface` (now a manual Operation impl declaring required `name` param) and `list surfaces` in execute() via json_result; unknown/missing name -> invalid_params listing valid surfaces (derived from catalog). Added 4 tool tests; updated the not-implemented loop to skip implemented ops; refreshed stale module doc.
+    - crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/Cargo.toml: added swissarmyhammer-expect dep.
+
+    TDD: wrote failing catalog/dispatch tests first (RED: empty catalog stub + not_implemented stub), then implemented (GREEN).
+
+    Verification (all green):
+    - cargo nextest -p swissarmyhammer-expect -p swissarmyhammer-tools -E 'test(surface)' -> 20 passed
+    - expect tool module tests -> 11 passed (grid tests unaffected)
+    - cargo check --workspace -> ok
+    - cargo fmt applied; cargo clippy -p swissarmyhammer-expect -p swissarmyhammer-tools -- -D warnings -> clean
+
+    double-check (advisory) returned REVISE on two points: (1) tests didn't pin literal field values -> added the golden test; (2) doc comment falsely claimed "canonical ideas/expect.md order" -> reworded to "Surface enum declaration order". Both fixed and re-verified.
+
+    Left in `doing` for /review.
+  timestamp: 2026-06-26T19:19:06.337605+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW260M8QZ8T37A8RZGDDVZ81
